title: Ukrainian Famine and Genocide (“Holodomor”) Memorial Day Act
title_en: Ukrainian Famine and Genocide (“Holodomor”) Memorial Day Act
description: Ukrainian Famine and Genocide (“Holodomor”) Memorial Day Act (Ukrainian Famine and Genocide (“Holod...). Current to 2026-02-04.

provisions.title: Short title
provisions.content: 1 This Act may be cited as the Ukrainian Famine and Genocide (“Holodomor”) Memorial Day Act .

provisions.chapter: Ukrainian Famine and Genocide (“holodomor”) Memorial Day
provisions.title: Ukrainian Famine and Genocide (“Holodomor”) Memorial Day
provisions.content: 2 Throughout Canada, in each and every year, the fourth Saturday in November shall be known as “Ukrainian Famine and Genocide (“Holodomor”) Memorial Day”.

provisions.chapter: Ukrainian Famine and Genocide (“holodomor”) Memorial Day
provisions.title: Not a legal holiday
provisions.content: 3 For greater certainty, Ukrainian Famine and Genocide (“Holodomor”) Memorial Day is not a legal holiday or a non-juridical day.
